sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57369" key="kiki/balos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κικίβαλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n57369.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shell-fish</tr_>, prob.in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κικοβαυλιτίδες</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
